privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated video with extreme dynamic range created via ffmpeg. The expected output file paths (/home/ga/Music/fm_broadcast_audio.mp3 and /home/ga/Documents/fm_specs.json), 1 channel (Mono), 44100 sample rate, 128 kbps bitrate, and mp3 format exactly match the explicit instructions, setup scripts, and verifier.py logic.
